layman_headline: Deeply oversold meme coin showing first signs of life in a fearful market.
layman_explanation: TRUMP coin has been beaten down nearly 98% from its all-time high and its RSI reading of 22 puts it in deeply oversold territory — historically one of the most reliable bounce signals we track. The coin just posted a 6% daily gain, suggesting buyers are stepping in at these extreme lows. The overall crypto market is in 'Fear' mode, which means most people are too scared to buy, but that's often when the best short-term bounces happen.
layman_action: This is a speculative bounce trade with a tight stop-loss. Only risk what you can afford to lose — position size small. If it hits $1.42, exit immediately. If it reaches $1.95, take profits.
expert_reasoning: RSI at 22.3 is the strongest oversold reading among all candidates, and RSI-based entries have an 80% win rate in our signal credibility data with +5.5% average returns. The 6.2% daily bounce from extreme lows suggests a potential double-bottom formation near $1.50 support. The chart bias is bearish (-0.70) and price is below all major MAs, so this is purely a mean-reversion bounce trade, not a trend-following play. The tight stop at $1.42 (15% below entry) limits downside while the $1.95 target offers roughly 17% upside — acceptable risk/reward for a high-conviction oversold bounce. High BTC dominance at 56.6% is a headwind for alts, so we keep position sizing conservative.
risk_factors: Bearish chart structure with price below all MAs — this is a counter-trend trade that could fail if selling pressure resumes
High BTC dominance (56.6%) is actively draining capital from altcoins, especially speculative meme coins
Weekend trading with geopolitical risk (oil supply headlines) could trigger broader crypto sell-off
watch_list: TRUMP holding above $1.50 support — a break below invalidates the bounce thesis
BTC price action over the weekend — any drop below $63,000 would pressure all alts heavily
Fear & Greed index movement — a further drop toward 20 could signal capitulation selling across alts
market_context: The crypto market is in a 'Fear' state (28/100) with BTC dominance at 56.6%, creating a hostile environment for altcoins. BTC itself is modestly green and there are massive call spreads targeting $72K by month-end, which could provide a supportive backdrop if momentum builds.
context_banner: Deeply oversold RSI on TRUMP at 22.3 triggers our highest-confidence signal in a fearful market primed for mean-reversion bounces.

key_signals.description: TRUMP RSI at 22.3 is deeply oversold — our most reliable signal with 80% win rate and +5.5% avg return historically.
Market Fear at 28/100 with flat trend — contrarian indicator suggesting oversold bounces are more likely than further capitulation.
FTX distributing $900M to creditors in fifth payment round could inject fresh capital into crypto markets, supporting a risk-on bounce.
Dangerous weekend with 20% of world oil supply at risk — geopolitical uncertainty adds both risk and potential safe-haven crypto bid.
TRUMP's 6.2% daily gain against a bearish trend suggests early accumulation at extreme lows, though confirmation needed.
